brief.iconConcept: A single clipped-corner capability card with a luminous centered agent spark, representing a reusable agent card artifact inside the Windows Clippy widget.
brief.negativeConstraints: text, letters, watermark, border, frame, rounded-square tile, busy background, multiple cards, document stack, profile avatar, human face, credit card, id badge, screenshot, low contrast, tiny details, photorealism, 3d render clutter, gradients that blur edges
brief.referenceNotes: Target surfaces: Windows Clippy widget live tile, schema popup, and Microsoft 365-compatible icon packaging. Prioritize unmistakable 32x32 recognition over decorative detail.

stateIcons.name: default-32
stateIcons.meaning: Agentcard schema and tool palette are available but idle.
stateIcons.visualDelta: Card body remains neutral ice-white with a standard cyan spark inset.

stateIcons.name: focused-32
stateIcons.meaning: Agentcard tile is active or generating icon outputs.
stateIcons.visualDelta: Same silhouette with brighter cyan spark and slightly elevated luminance for active-state emphasis.

generation.prompt: Create a clean square software agent icon. Style: modern Microsoft-adjacent productivity icon, flat vector, crisp silhouette, centered composition, strong contrast, minimal detail, no text, no border, no rounded-corner container. Subject: a single upright capability card shape with a clipped top-right corner and a centered four-point agent spark inset, representing an agent card. The foreground symbol should read as one card, not a document stack. Use a deep cobalt background #2146C7, an ice-white card body, and an electric cyan spark accent #77E8FF. Keep the symbol centered inside a generous safe area, occupying about 58 percent of the canvas. Legible at 32x32, simple solid background, strong silhouette, subtle inner depth only where it helps small-size readability. Avoid document lines, avatar portraits, profile photos, credit cards, ID badges, stacks of cards, UI screenshots, tiny details, or decorative textures.
generation.negativePrompt: text, letters, watermark, border, frame, rounded-square tile, busy background, multiple cards, document stack, profile avatar, human face, credit card, id badge, screenshot, low contrast, tiny details, photorealism, 3d render clutter, gradients that blur edges

reviewChecklist: core card symbol stays within safe area
